initial_requirements: I need a WeChat mini-program for identity verification and online transaction services.
user_stories: As a user, I want to authenticate my real name, so that my identity is verified within the mini-program.
As a user, I want to upload ID information and use ID recognition, so that my identification documents are processed digitally.
As a user, I want to query personal information, so that I can view my specific data records.
As a user, I want to conduct online transactions, so that I can perform necessary operations within the platform.
As a user, I want to use facial recognition, so that I can verify my identity securely.
As a user, I want to chat with customer service online, so that I can get assistance when needed.
As a user, I want the page background to be ghost white, so that the interface has a specific visual style.
As a user, I want all components to be colored with cadet blue, so that the interface design is consistent.

conversation.interviewer: What identity verification methods should the mini-program support (e.g., ID card OCR, facial recognition, phone number binding, bank card verification), and what types of online transactions will users perform (e.g., payments, transfers, purchases of specific services)?
conversation.user: For identity verification, I expect it to be implemented through real-name authentication, ID document upload with recognition, and facial recognition. Regarding the specific types of online transactions, I am not sure — could you ask a more specific question about that?

conversation.interviewer: Will users primarily be making payments for specific services (like utility bills, government fees, or insurance premiums), or will they be transferring money to other individuals or accounts?
conversation.user: I am not sure about the specific types of online transactions at this level of detail. Could you ask a more specific question about the transaction functionality?

conversation.interviewer: After a user completes identity verification, what should the immediate next step or screen be — should they be taken directly to a transaction interface, a dashboard with multiple options, or something else?
conversation.user: I am not sure about the specific navigation flow after identity verification. Could you ask a more specific question about the user interface or functionality?

final_metrics.evaluator_note: approx_ESR is computed from turn-level action labels and hit results; ReqElicitGym source did not expose a standalone ESR metric.

initial_requirements: I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.
user_stories: As a user, I want to register and log in to my account, so that I can securely access the instant messaging software.
As a user, I want to add friends, so that I can connect with other users.
As a user, I want to create groups, so that I can communicate with multiple people simultaneously.
As a user, I want to send and receive messages in real-time, so that I can have immediate communication.
As a user, I want to send text, images, videos, and other types of messages, so that I can share various forms of content.
As a user, I want to engage in both group chats and private chats, so that I can communicate in different contexts.
As a user, I want to transfer files, so that I can share documents and data with others.
As a user, I want to make voice calls and video calls, so that I can communicate via audio and video.
As a user, I want the background color to be light blue, so that the interface has a specific visual style.
As a user, I want all elements to be dark blue, so that the interface components are visually consistent.

conversation.interviewer: What types of messages should users be able to send—text only, or also images, files, voice messages, and video? And should the app support both one-on-one and group conversations?
conversation.user: Users should be able to send text, images, videos, and files to share various forms of content. As for conversations, yes, the app should support both one-on-one communication (adding friends) and group conversations (creating groups) so users can connect with others in different ways.

conversation.interviewer: Should the app show message delivery status indicators (like sent, delivered, read) and provide push notifications for incoming messages?
conversation.user: I'm not sure about those specific features. Could you ask a more specific question about the core messaging functionality, user interactions, or visual design of the application?

conversation.interviewer: What visual style or theme should the messaging app have—for example, a clean minimalist design with light colors, a dark mode option, or a specific color scheme and branding?
conversation.user: I prefer the background color to be light blue and all elements to be dark blue.

final_metrics.evaluator_note: approx_ESR is computed from turn-level action labels and hit results; ReqElicitGym source did not expose a standalone ESR metric.

initial_requirements: I need a responsive web application that allows users to navigate different pages to view and submit data.
user_stories: As a user, I want to browse different pages, so that I can navigate through the application content.
As a user, I want to submit forms, so that I can input and send data to the system.
As a user, I want to view data, so that I can see the information presented by the application.
As a user, I want the application to have a responsive design adapting to different screen sizes and devices, so that I can use it comfortably on any device.
As a user, I want the global background color to be light coral, so that the application has a specific visual appearance.
As a user, I want all UI pieces to be colored indian red, so that the interface components are visually consistent.

conversation.interviewer: What specific types of data will users be viewing and submitting? For example, are they working with customer records, product inventory, forms, reports, or something else?
conversation.user: I prefer to input and send data by submitting forms. However, I'm not sure about the specific content types like customer records or inventory - that level of detail isn't something I've specified. Feel free to ask a more specific question about the interaction method or style preferences if needed.

conversation.interviewer: After a user submits a form, what should happen next? For example, should they see a confirmation message, be redirected to another page, or be able to submit another form immediately?
conversation.user: I'm not sure about the specific post-submission behavior such as confirmation messages or redirects. That level of detail hasn't been specified on my end. Feel free to ask a more specific question about the interaction method or style preferences if needed.

conversation.interviewer: Do you have any preferences for the visual style of the application, such as a light or dark theme, specific color schemes, or a particular layout density (e.g., compact vs. spacious)?
conversation.user: Yes, I do have specific color preferences. I prefer the global background color to be light coral, and I prefer all UI pieces to be colored indian red.

final_metrics.evaluator_note: approx_ESR is computed from turn-level action labels and hit results; ReqElicitGym source did not expose a standalone ESR metric.
